title: Mega Showdown Item Pack
description: Adds recipes and loot tables for Cobblemon: Mega Showdown
body:
Adds recipes and loot tables for rare and unobtainable items, designed to be the only loot datapack you’ll ever need!

(based on MSDLT by Aio, uninstall it before installing this)

Currently adds recipes & loot tables for:
- type gem converts
- all tera shards
- all legendary form change items (plates, memories, cells, etc)
- ancient origin and cherish balls
- ressurection machine recipe for 1% (squishy) zygarde
- dormant crystal for terapagos

  
<details>
<summary>All (most) legendary item recipes in the pack</summary>
  
![Updated recipe list](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ee5b07cbb635b33a1811f3032b3d86f6a9ab2d19.png)

</details>



Recipes and loot tables can be viewed with [EMI](https://modrinth.com/mod/emi) and [EMI loot](https://modrinth.com/mod/emi-loot).

A few features are borrowed with permission from other packs, their authors will be credited as contributors.
